    Class
    Description
    WrittenGenomicRun
    Write-side container for a single genomic run, passed to SpectralDataset.writeMinimal.
  • Classes in global.thalion.ttio.genomics used by global.thalion.ttio.genomics
    Class
    Description
    AlignedRead
    One aligned sequencing read — the genomic analogue of MassSpectrum.
    GenomicIndex
    Per-read offsets, lengths, positions, mapping qualities, flags, and chromosome strings for one GenomicRun.

    Lazy view over one /study/genomic_runs/<name>/ group.
